subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! In times past thou wert favored with the mention of God, glorified be His majesty, and now the countenance of His loving-kindness is turned unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین از قبل بذکر حق جل جلاله فائز شدی و حالهم وجه عنایت بتو متوجه
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
